## Title

Admin Authentication Access

## User Story

**As a** admin

**I want** to securely log in and register

**So that** I can safely access and manage the system

## Story Points

[3]

## Tasks

- [ ] Design login and registration forms
- [ ] Implement authentication logic (Flask + SQLite3)
- [ ] Add password encryption and validation
- [ ] Test login/logout functionality

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Admin can successfully register and log in
- [ ] Invalid credentials are rejected
- [ ] Passwords are securely stored (hashed)
- [ ] Session handling works properly

## Given / When / Then

**Given** the admin has valid credentials,

**when** they log in,

**then** they are granted secure access to the dashboard

## Validation and Evidence

**Validation method**
Authentication testing

**Related repository evidence**
docs/authentication.md
